reason: Naïve exec is made president of a big company as part of a stock scam.
Law school grad joins a hotshot firm then uncovers its ties to organized crime.
Systems analyst loses her identity after joining a software firm that’s a front.
Ex-employee lands a VP role at old firm then exposes its corporate sabotage scheme.
Rising attorney joins elite law practice then realizes it’s literally run by the devil.
Inventor joins a slick consultancy then finds his process exploited by enemy agents.
Taxi driver becomes polling pundit only to stumble into a shadowy conspiracy ring.
Parachute instructor’s first skydiving gig goes awry when he uncovers a rescue scam.
Banker unboxes surprise money then finds his life transformed into a ruthless game.
Pilot boards a secret mission team and soon discovers a hijacking conspiracy.
